items.title: France urges citizens to leave Mali after rebel attacks
items.dek: The UK has issued similar advice, telling citizens who stay, that they do so at their own risk.
items.body: The UK has issued similar advice, telling citizens who stay, that they do so at their own risk.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: EU 'ready' to sanction Israel over Ukrainian grain stolen by Russia
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Outrage after Indian man carries his sister's skeleton to a bank to prove her death
items.dek: A video from Odisha state of Jitu Munda taking the remains to the bank went viral this week, leading to anger.
items.body: A video from Odisha state of Jitu Munda taking the remains to the bank went viral this week, leading to anger.
items.author: IriLine Desk
